appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Flow Validator Guidance: gateway-vm' section with Node B SSH testing approach, concurrency limits, and isolation boundaries for VM/gateway validation

steps: Deploy kernel (vmlinux) and rootfs (rootfs.ext4) to /var/lib/go-choir/guest/ on node-b
Update go-choir-vmctl.service with Firecracker env vars (VM_FIRECRACKER_BIN, VM_KERNEL_IMAGE, VM_ROOTFS_IMAGE, VM_STATE_DIR, VM_HOST_BASE_PORT)
deploymentRequired.localTestSummary: 38 vmctl tests PASS, 14 vmmanager tests PASS, 31 proxy tests PASS (including 8 VM-specific routing tests)

notes: All 28 gateway-vm assertions are BLOCKED due to deployment gap between local implementation and Node B
Implementation is complete and verified via comprehensive local unit tests
Node B requires redeploy of latest commit to enable VM/gateway validation
Frontend SPA serves correctly from Node B, confirming Caddy is operational
Auth service on Node B works for basic auth (registration/login/session), but runtime/gateway APIs return 404
